Description: Forgejo git repository and CI artifact storage
Notes: forgejo-data Docker volume only - IPFS is a separate unintegrated volume in this compose file not actually used by Forgejo
AES-GCM encrypted local volume - listener is plain HTTP internally - no TLS/mTLS configured for the in-cluster hop

Description: Long-term audit and metrics log storage
Notes: Not yet backed by durable storage - OBSERVATORY_DB_PATH is configured but never opened by the worker - audit events currently live only in an in-process deque and are lost on restart
